name: io.github.ueni/codebase-tooling-mcp
title: codebase-tooling-mcp
description: Repository engineering MCP server for one mounted Git worktree.

runtimeArguments.name: --mount
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the target repository into the container at /repo.

repository_path.description: Host path of the Git repository to expose to codebase-tooling-mcp.

runtimeArguments.name: --workdir
runtimeArguments.description: Use the mounted repository as the container working directory.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Use stdio for registry-managed local package launch.

environmentVariables.name: REPO_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Container path for the mounted repository.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_MUTATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Set true only after reviewing sandbox and rollback guidance.

io.github.ueni.registryReadiness.publication: maintainer-gated OIDC only; no ordinary CI publication
